description_long: This is a robust, square wooden storage box with a reinforced frame and visible wood grain texture on all sides. The panels are constructed from horizontal wooden planks, each showing natural knots and grain patterns, giving the box a rustic and sturdy appearance. The corners are reinforced with metallic fasteners, suggesting durability and the ability to withstand rough handling. The top of the box is flat and bordered by a raised wooden lip, which may help secure a lid or prevent items from sliding off. There are no visible handles, locks, or labeling areas, and the surface is uniformly finished in a medium brown wood tone. The box is likely designed for use in garages, warehouses, or outdoor urban environments where secure, stackable storage is needed.
description: A sturdy, square wooden storage box with reinforced corners, visible wood grain, and a flat, bordered top. The box is finished in a medium brown tone and lacks handles or labeling.
description_view_0: Front view shows a flat wooden panel with horizontal planks, wood grain, and metallic corner fasteners.
description_view_1: Side view is nearly identical to the front, with similar wood grain and plank arrangement.
description_view_2: Another side view with slightly different wood grain patterns and plank alignment.
description_view_3: Rear view features more pronounced wood grain swirls and knots, with the same reinforced corners.
